Recovery and Resilience Facility (Regulation EU 2021/241) — NextGenerationEU, €723 billion pandemic recovery fund, and the EU's first large-scale joint debt issuance
Rule of Law Conditionality Regulation (EU 2020/2092) — linking EU budget payments to rule of law compliance, Hungary and Poland disputes
Russia Sanctions Regime (Council Regulation 833/2014) — EU sectoral sanctions imposed after the annexation of Crimea and the war in Ukraine, the largest Western sanctions package since the Cold War

Belarus Sanctions Framework (Council Regulation 765/2006 and updates) — EU sanctions on Belarus following the 2020 disputed election, Lukashenko crackdown, and the forced diversion of Ryanair flight FR4978
Renewable Energy Directive I (2009/28/EC) — the first EU law setting binding national targets for renewable energy, establishing the 20% by 2020 goal
Energy Efficiency Directive (2012/27/EU) — first binding EU energy efficiency targets, introduced after the 2008 financial crisis exposed Europe's energy security vulnerability
Trans-European Energy Infrastructure Regulation — TEN-E (EU 2022/869) — planning and permitting of cross-border energy infrastructure, revised after the Russia gas crisis to exclude fossil fuels
Citizens' Free Movement Directive (2004/38/EC) — right of EU citizens and their families to move and reside freely across Member States, the foundational act behind Brexit debates
